feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Standard Message 06 054 when converting PR to PO
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,
we are using MRP for creating PR's that should be converted to a PO type NBIC. For that purpose we created a PR type NBIC and expect that PR's will be converted to PO's without issue. However, system is trying to use PO type NB instead and issues an error:
"Doc. type/item cat. NBIC/U (requisition) <-> NB/ (purch. order)".

What are we missing? We set up in SSCUI 102909 for PO type NBIC that it can be created from a PR type NBIC with item category "U". Why system is not doing NBIC - NBIC conversion but forcing NB type instead?

entry.title: India GST 5% tax codes are missing in S/4HANA Cloud Public standard tax code list.
entry.content:
We are currently implementing the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and preparing the GST tax code setup. 

Below GST rates are missing 

- 5% GST: CGST 2.5% + SGST 2.5%, or IGST 5%
- 18% GST: CGST 9% + SGST 9%, or IGST 18%

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Asset Revaluation - SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm working with Asset Accounting in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for Portugal and I have a question regarding asset revaluation.

In the Portuguese localization, when performing an asset revaluation, I would like to understand the correct accounting approach:

  • Is it possible to post the revaluation directly to account 5891 (Excedentes de Revalorização), or should a clearing account be used as an intermediate step before transferring to equity? If a clearing account is used, how and when does the balance get transferred to the final equity account — is this automatic or manual?
  • Does SAP standard use a dedicated clearing account during the revaluation process in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, or does it post directly to equity?
  • What is the expected behaviour regarding depreciation after revaluation? Is depreciation recalculated automatically based on the revalued asset base, and does the system automatically handle the gradual realisation of the revaluation surplus from 5891 to Retained Earnings?
  • How are deferred taxes handled in this scenario? Are they automatically calculated and posted by the system, or do they require manual configuration and posting?

I would appreciate any clarification on the standard best practice for Portugal in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: GL open item management
entry.content:
Company Code    GL    Description    Remarks    Remarks 2
2000    254101    Sales tax Accrued    Global Accounting is activated    Open item not managed
3000    178700    Input Tax    Error     Open item not managed

entry.title: completion rule in sales quotation
entry.content:
Hi SAP expert,

In SAP R3, we can configure the completion rule of sales quotation in the item category settings. This is not available in Public Cloud. When I create a sales order with  reference to  a quotation, the quotation reference status is not updated, it remains “Not Referenced”, therefore, multiple sales orders can be created from a single quotation, causing us many problems with duplicate orders.

Is this standard behavior in S4, or is there a way to update the reference status field?

Thans in advance

entry.title: credit note and Debit note
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team

We are experiencing an issue with the round-off calculation in Credit Note and Debit Note documents.

entry.title: PO Short Text - Supplier Invoice Line Item Text
entry.content:
Hi,

we are using public cloud and want to copy the text of the purchase order item to the FI supplier invoice line item during posting of the supplier invoice.

This functionality already exists for the goods received posting and is described in the note https://me.sap.com/notes/2921484/en-US.

As we have purchase orders without goods received posting, we would need this functionality also for posting of the supplier invoice.

Does anyone know if this will be a standard feature soon?

BR

entry.title: Quantity conversion management between PC/KG in sales order/delivery
entry.content:
In the sales process, the order is entered in pieces (PC/PZ), while logistics execution and warehouse goods issue must reflect the actual weight in KG communicated by the warehouse.
At item level in the sales document, there is a quantity conversion field between the commercial unit of measure and the weight unit of measure (example shown: 10 PC ↔ 5 KG).
For reference, we are using:

Sales Order: 202
Material: 97

However, the system does not allow the correct handling of decimal values / decimal separators in the conversion ratio, preventing the entry of actual quantities such as, for example:

10 PC = 5.4 KG
1 PC = 0.540 KG

As a consequence, the system continues to use a theoretical or rigidly determined conversion, with an impact on the actual logistics data.

We would like to verify whether there is a standard way in SAP S/4HANA Cloud to:

  • manually update the PC/KG conversion field with the actual value received from the warehouse;
  • manage decimal values in the conversion ratio;

entry.title: product Revision level
entry.content:
Hi All, Please Suggest.

I’m working on some post migration tasks one of them is mass load of Product Revision Level.

In ECC we used External Revision Levels allowing us to enter any level we wanted.

P1 – P5 was for preproduction product then it would get a number or another alphanumeric code.

In S4 public cloud is there a configuration that will allow us to use any revision level we want…

If I removed all the Revision Levels will that allow us the use anything we want???

Thanks

entry.title: Clarification on Best Practices for Activating Additional Ledger (2L) in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP community

We are currently reviewing our fixed assets setup in SAP. Since Go live, only the leading Ledger 0L has been active and used for asset accounting postings.

We are now conseidering using ledger 2L and depreciation area 15 for tax reporting purposes and we would appreciate your guidance on the recommended approach. 

Specifically, we would like to confirm:

1. Best Practice Approach

  • What is SAP’s recommended best practice to work with a new depreciation area linked to the ledger 2L after go-live in fexed Asset

2. Data Replication Capability

  • Does SAP provide any standard functionality in S/4HANA Public Cloud to automatically replicate or copy historical data (e.g., depreciation) from depreciation area 1 to tax depreciation area

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Unable to Restrict Edit Functionality in Display Maintenance Order App
entry.content: We would like to restrict the Edit functionality in the Display Maintenance Order app. Currently, users can view and also edit maintenance orders, but the requirement is to provide display-only access. During our analysis, we created a test role with only the SAP_EAM_BC_MP_ORD_DSP_PC catalog, which allows users to display orders but not edit them, showing the desired behavior. This indicates that an additional catalog, IAM app, or authorization is granting Edit access. We request help to identify the authorization responsible and guidance on how to restrict editing while keeping display access. I have prepared a Word document with attached screenshots showing what we are currently experiencing and what we desire.

entry.title: Purchase order 4500000012 does not contain items for a stock transfer (M7153)
entry.content: During the PGI process, an error occurred and the PGI could not be completed.

entry.title: Revision level for a material in S4 public cloud
entry.content:
Hi All, Please Suggest.

I’m working on some post migration tasks one of them is mass load of Product Revision Level.

In ECC we used External Revision Levels allowing us to enter any level we wanted.

P1 – P5 was for preproduction product then it would get a number or another alphanumeric code.

In S4 public cloud is there a configuration that will allow us to use any revision level we want…

If I removed all the Revision Levels will that allow us the use anything we want???

Thanks

entry.title: Requirement for BP Type-Based Customer Statement Email Processing
entry.content: Currently, customer statements are sent automatically through Output Parameter Determination and the Schedule Accounts Receivable Jobs application. The customer requirement is to send emails based on the Business Partner Type instead of processing all customers together. Please confirm whether filtering or scheduling based on BP Type is available in the standard SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud functionality, or if this requirement would require a custom enhancement.

entry.title: System is picking incorrect dep start date for ledger 3L in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Could you please help us identify a depreciation key for ledger 3L where the system picks the depreciation start date based on the posting date?

For testing purposes, please refer to asset code 50000007-0.

For this asset, the following depreciation keys have been maintained and are working as expected under the SLM method:

  • Ledger 0L – Depreciation Key: AS04
  • Ledger 2L – Depreciation Key: LINE

We are looking for a similar depreciation key for ledger 3L that calculates depreciation using the posting date as the depreciation start date.

Note: We have tested all depreciation keys currently available under ledger 3L; however, none of them are picking the correct depreciation calculation start date.

Regards,
Vishal kori

entry.title: Worklist not seen in Process collection Worklist App
entry.content:
Hi Team,
In BFC scope when we create dispute case and in Manage dispute case app when we keep the status as (23)Not justified that mean the worklist should be created and seen in process collection worklist app with in 24 hours but I'm not able see the worklist there.
Please help me in this issue

entry.title: 在采购订单表头新增自定义字段失败
entry.content: 我们创建采购订单是在外围系统发起流程后通过接口创建的，创建完成后需要将流程编码返回到SAP，此时需要新增一个自定义字段，新增时失败

entry.title: how can I change the value of “GL Account Not Used” to No
entry.content:
how can I change the value of “GL Account Not Used” to No?

I have tried changing it by unchecking this option in the “Manage Operating GL Accounts” app, but after saving, it reverts back to the original value. (In the “Manage GL Accounts Master Data” app, I cannot find this field either.)

Is there any other way to change this setting?

entry.title: Supplier DPR creation We are facing error _Account 65001000 does not exist in chart of accounts YCOA
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While attempting to create a supplier down payment request with a WBS element in the test system, we encountered the following error: "Account 65001000 does not exist in the chart of accounts YCOA."

We did not encounter this error during testing in the custom system. In the custom system, we observed that this GL account (65001000 - Purchase Service) was blocked in the master data, and its implementation status was set to 'In process'—however, these settings were not transferred to the test system.

My question is: What is the relationship between this GL code and the supplier down payment process? We did not configure this setup.

We do not want to use this GL code.

Please let me know if there is any standard SAP configuration related to this.

Thanks & Regards,

DNR

entry.title: Does the WBS field on the sales order have an extension point?
entry.content:
I need to write a custom field from material master data (model) to the WBS field on the sales order line item. However, when implementing this custom logic, I noticed that the WBS field is not available in the CHANGING parameters of the extension point I selected. Later, I tried other extension points but still couldn't find the WBS field. Which extension point should I use to achieve the logic described above? Or does the public cloud not support custom logic for the WBS field on sales orders?

Below are the extension points I have tried:

- Market Segment Enhancement Substitution: FINS_MARKET_SEGMENT_SUB
- Modification of Business Data in Sales Document Item: SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM_BUSINESS
- Data Transfer for Contract Item Assignment: SD_ASSG_CONTRITM_DATATRANSFER
- Item Change in Outbound EDI Sales Order/Return Order: EDI_SD_ORDER_CONF_OUT_ITEM
